title: tectaria haenkei
intro: Tectaria haenkei, also known as Haenke's fern or Haenke's tectaria, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Tectaria haenkei are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage, thereby providing health benefits such as relief from pain and improved immune function. Tectaria haenkei is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it may also be used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs.
